race.description: The Marong Family Hotel Maiden Plate
race.comment: The biggest meeting of the year for Warracknabeal, a track where it is generally advantageous to be on-speed near the fence. SHOTARO (9) settled back in the field last start, but was forward in the run the start prior when only beaten a couple of length by a horse who went on to win in town at his next start. Although unplaced last start, SHOTARO was only beaten 1.5 lengths and will be better for the run at 2000m. POOR OL' JOHNY RAY (8) jumps sharply in trip after an adequate first-up run and looks suited. Draws ideally in one and the form is better than it reads on paper as he was tested in some good 3YO races last campaign. MEGA NEEDS (3) was plain first-up but improved significantly up to the mile last start and looks even better suited at this trip. CHOUXDINO (1) has fitness on his side and is likely to race in a forward position, which will ensure he gives himself every chance. Stablemate EPOCH (2) has been building this prep, placing at his past two, and also draws well.
